description.p: OrbitShell is a local-first desktop terminal experience built with Rust and GPUI.
It combines block-based command output, project-oriented navigation, inline file previews, and ACP/MCP surfaces in a single workspace UI.

ul.li: Block-based terminal output with command history context
Sidebar explorer, search, and git views for local workspaces
Inline previews for text, markdown, and images inside the workspace
Settings, ACP Registry, and MCP server surfaces in-app

screenshot.caption: Welcome screen with recent projects and quick actions
Workspace view with sidebar, file preview, and terminal split
Settings screens for appearance and distribution metadata
